'''Ramsees Hed''' was a docking port located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Cal-Seti/Legends|Cal-Seti]].

==History==
[[Kyle Katarn]] [[Mission to Cal-Seti|placed]] a tracking device on a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] at the port, which led him to an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Droid/Legends|robotics]] facility on [[Anteevy/Legends|Anteevy]].

{{Loc-stub}}
